name: law-gazelle
description: Local-first case command center for private legal matter data. Syncs operator-provided Nest databases, surfaces Today workflow, deadlines, legal documents, stale-data signals, sidecar state, and MCP/local-AI tools for legal sessions. Public repository content is app code plus synthetic examples only.
author: SAFE App Store

data_streams.purpose: Canonical legal case data synced from Nest into local app data
data_streams.description: SQLite case DBs, export JSON, drafts, and letter artifacts copied from ~/Desktop/Nest

data_streams.purpose: Operational state for the TUI and MCP tools
data_streams.description: Resolved/snoozed items, notes, activity, fact review state, and AI cache

data_streams.purpose: Optional local Ollama ranking, briefing, drafting, and fact inspection
data_streams.description: Prompt inputs and model outputs cached locally by content fingerprint
